The GAA @officialgaa · 49s Follow our Live Blog for Championship updates #GAA

item.title: TomasORuanaidh: Tommy Rooney @TomasORuanaidh · 15min Monaghan arrest their slide in 2026 with a massive win against Cavan, they'll play
item.description:
Tommy Rooney @TomasORuanaidh · 15min Monaghan arrest their slide in 2026 with a massive win against Cavan, they'll play Derry in the Ulster SFC semi-final, who looked v good against Antrim.
Cavan missed a penalty and spurned a number of goal chances.
Monaghan 0-27 2-14 Cavan. #GAA 1 8 1 mil

item.title:
CahairOKane1: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 16min Biggest margin of victory in a Monaghan-Cavan championship game since 1972.
Monagha
item.description:
Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 16min Biggest margin of victory in a Monaghan-Cavan championship game since 1972.
Monaghan showed enough in the first 50 minutes that nobody can seriously see Derry’s semi-final is a gimme.
Great to see Conor McCarthy and a very lean looking Killian Lavelle back on grass 1 2 13 1 mil

item.title:
BBCSPORTNI: BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 16min It's all over in Clones!
Monaghan are into the last four of the Ulster Championship,
item.description:
BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 16min It's all over in Clones!
Monaghan are into the last four of the Ulster Championship, where they will face Derry
#BBCGAA 1 4 659
